element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players collect single digits from vines to build arithmetic expressions
Players place symbols between digits to form valid equations
Players must reach this number by constructing correct arithmetic expressions
Core locomotion from Donkey Kong Jr., reused without modification
Players solve predetermined equations by collecting specific number/symbol sequences

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching target number in Calculate mode
typical_tension_triggers: Climbing to reach distant numbers on vines
Deciding which arithmetic operation to use
Working against time pressure (game context unclear from sources)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based/puzzle-paced. Players deliberate on math solutions before climbing. Tension derived from arithmetic decision-making rather than action urgency. Educational rhythm prioritizes problem-solving over moment-to-moment action.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Entry-level arithmetic; climbing vines from Donkey Kong Jr. mechanics are familiar to players of original game
notable_spikes: Math problem difficulty mismatch: Frank Provo (GameSpot) noted puzzles were either too easy for young children or too boring for older players
Critical reception suggests overall design misstep rather than difficulty progression curve

notable_level_patterns.description: Open-ended arithmetic construction. Donkey Kong displays target number at top. Players climb vines to collect digits and symbols, build expression that equals target. Supports 1-2 players competing simultaneously. Encourages multiple solution paths.

Constrained arithmetic. Fixed math problems presented. Players must climb chains to collect correct numbers and operations in predetermined sequence. Supports 1-2 players. Linear solution path per puzzle.

Direct reuse of Donkey Kong Jr. locomotion. All digit/symbol collection requires vertical traversal. Spatial layout emphasizes reaching distributed targets on playfield. No horizontal exploration; purely vertical navigation.

sources_used: Wikipedia - Donkey Kong Jr. Math (gameplay, modes, reception)
The Cutting Room Floor - Donkey Kong Jr. Math (development context, asset reuse)
